name: Emory University
meets_full_need_notes: Emory meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for domestic students. The Emory Advantage program reduces or eliminates loans for families under certain income thresholds.
no_loan_notes: Emory includes loans in some aid packages but Emory Advantage reduces or replaces loans for students from families with incomes below defined thresholds. Not a universal no-loan policy.

merit_thresholds.notes: Emory offers major merit scholarships through Emory Scholars, Oxford Scholars, Goizueta Scholars, and Woodruff Scholars. Selection is holistic and highly competitive.

ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive the same need-based aid as RD applicants. Binding commitment may be released if aid award is insufficient.
appeal_policy: Emory reviews special circumstance appeals through the Office of Financial Aid. Families submit documentation of income changes, medical costs, or other unusual circumstances.
